creator: emz@norma.perm.ru
text:
Same stuff here. camcontrol identify doesn't lead to topology change, but smartctl -a definitely does. This is reproducible on a fresh 11.[ and 10.3.

Controller:
LSI MegaRAID SAS 9341-4i

Firmware:
Product Name    : LSI MegaRAID SAS 9341-4i
Serial No       : SV62122829
FW Package Build: 24.2.1-0021

action: Enable all features using 'zpool upgrade'. Once this is done,
